author: unknown
body:
Scope note during implementation: dropped the "classify_sessions marks a session Dead when the overlay file is missing" criterion from slice 1.

Reason: the qemu-alive + overlay-missing case is rare (qemu holds the qcow2 fd open), can't be reproduced in a pure unit test without a real qemu process, and the common qemu-dead + overlay-missing case is already Dead via the existing PID check. Slice 2's orphan sweep doesn't route through classify_sessions either — it compares overlay_dir against live runtime_dir session ids directly. So the tightening is cosmetic for slice 1.

Net: slice 1 keeps the layout split, cleanup change, snapshot fix, and README note.
